The back was also very tall and its tail was held off the ground while walking. It was a quadreped with four sturdy legs and a tall, quadrupedal stance. Its rear legs were slightly longer then its front legs and its feet were short and blunt. It had relatively short arms and hands which ended in five digits with claws. It had scales on its skin and is believed to have eaten an herbivorous diet of low lying plants and foliage.

instruction: Describe the difference between active and passive voice.
original_output: The difference between active and passive voice is based on the way in which the sentence is structured and which words in the sentence are emphasized. In an active voice sentence, the subject of the sentence performs the action, while in a passive voice sentence, the subject receives the action. For example, in the sentence “The teacher taught the students,” the subject of the sentence is “the teacher,” and the action is “taught.” This is an active voice sentence. However, in the sentence “The students were taught by the teacher,” the subject of the sentence is “the students,” and the action is “were taught.” This is a passive voice sentence.

instruction: Research the effectiveness and side effects of using aspirin as an over-the-counter pain reliever.
original_output: Aspirin is a widely used and widely available over-the-counter pain reliever. It is most commonly used to relieve mild-to-moderate pain, reduce fever, and relieve inflammation. It is also used to prevent heart attacks and strokes.   The most common side effects of aspirin include stomach irritation, indigestion, nausea and vomiting. Less common but more severe side effects include bleeding, heartburn and allergic reactions. Aspirin can also cause constipation, diarrhea and drowsiness.   In terms of effectiveness, aspirin is generally considered to be an effective pain reliever and anti-inflammatory agent. In some cases, aspirin may also be used as a preventative treatment for heart attacks and strokes. Clinical studies have suggested that aspirin can reduce the risk of heart attack and stroke in some patients. However, it is important to consult a doctor before taking aspirin as it can interact with other medications and can cause side effects.
